TH_PATCHOULI-TRISMEGISTUS.title: Trismegistus
You discover what looks like an alchemist's laboratory.

Looking around, you see test tubes, beakers, flasks, bottles, and other experimental instruments scattered about, along with chaotic materials. On the workbench lies a [green]jade tablet[/green] inscribed with text, and a [gold]scepter[/gold] that seems [gold]unfinished[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-TRISMEGISTUS.pages.READ.des: You walk up to the workbench and examine the jade tablet's contents. You realize it is the legendary [green]Emerald Tablet[/green], which condenses the supreme secrets of alchemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-TRISMEGISTUS.pages.INLAY.de:
You turn your gaze to the unfinished scepter. It seems only the final step of setting a gemstone is missing, and the [gold]Philosopher's Stone[/gold] you have appears to fit perfectly into the scepter's groove.

Thinking this, you set the stone into it. Then you discover the scepter's power — [gold][jitter]the legendary transmutation of stone into gold[/jitter][/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-TRISMEGISTUS.pages.SEARCH.d:
You ignore the items on the workbench and instead rummage through the pile of materials, hoping to find something useful.

Your effort pays off — after some searching, you finally find a beautiful gemstone.
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_ALICE.title: Encounter Alice
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_ALICE.pages.INITIAL.de:
Walking toward the top of the tower, you suddenly notice a [gold][jitter]familiar figure[/jitter][/gold] ahead.

[fade_in]"Alice?"[/fade_in]

You call out tentatively. The person turns around, and you see clearly that it is indeed [gold]Alice[/gold].

[fade_in]"Oh, Patchouli! What a coincidence, running into each other here!"[/fade_in]
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_ALICE.pages.TALK.descr: You then exchange insights on magic, and both benefit greatly.
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_ALICE.pages.INITIAL.op: Add a [gold]Double Seven Combo[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_ALICE.pages.TOGETHER.d:
[fade_in]"Since we've met, why not travel together? You're heading to the top of the tower too, right?"[/fade_in]

You suggest.

[fade_in]"Yes, let's go together, Patchouli."[/fade_in]

[gold]Alice[/gold] nods in agreement.
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_REMI.title: Fated Encounter
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_REMI.loss: Died to the price of fate.
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_REMI.pages.INITIAL.des:
You walk slowly forward when you hear a familiar voice beside you. [fade_in]"Patchy~ We meet again!"[/fade_in]

Turning your head, you see [red]Remilia[/red]. But why is she here? You ask her your doubt: [fade_in]"Remi, why are you here?"[/fade_in]

[fade_in]"It's fate~ I recently got a new stone that enhances my abilities. Want to give it a try?"[/fade_in]
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_REMI.pages.REFACTOR.de:
[fade_in]"Let's give it a try then."[/fade_in]

You signal [red]Remilia[/red] to use her ability.

After a dizzying moment, you are surprised to find that something has indeed changed.
TH_PATCHOULI-MEET_REMI.pages.TAKE.descri:
[fade_in]"By the way, could I borrow this stone for research?"[/fade_in]

Hearing this, [red]Remilia[/red] hands you a crimson crystal and says:

[fade_in]"Here — take it if you're interested, Patchy. I don't need it anyway."[/fade_in]
TH_PATCHOULI-ALL_KNOW_BONE.title: All-Knowing Skull
TH_PATCHOULI-ALL_KNOW_BONE.pages.INITIAL:
You find yourself in an ancient, decorated room. In the center, a massive skull rests on an ornate pedestal. As you approach, the skull bursts into [jitter][green]flames[/green][/jitter] and turns toward you.

[jitter]"What do you seek? What will you offer?"[/jitter]

As soon as it speaks, the door behind you slams shut with a [jitter]bang[/jitter].

Lose [red]{ChoiceOne}[/red] HP.
Obtain a colorless card reward.
TH_PATCHOULI-ALL_KNOW_BONE.pages.KNOWLED:
[fade_in]"It is done..."[/fade_in]

You feel that many secrets you never knew have appeared in your mind.
TH_PATCHOULI-ALL_KNOW_BONE.pages.TREASUR:
[fade_in]"You humans never change. Your wish is granted."[/fade_in]

[fade_in]"Anything else?"[/fade_in]

[jitter][gold]Gold[/gold] starts raining down from above![/jitter]
[fade_in]"Maybe this will work?"[/fade_in]

You receive a potion that improves your constitution. It tastes quite sweet, like [green]juice[/green].

[fade_in]"Anything else?"[/fade_in]
TH_PATCHOULI-ALL_KNOW_BONE.pages.LEAVE.d:
[fade_in]"Look behind you, human."[/fade_in]

You glance back, and indeed, there is a door.
TH_PATCHOULI-CURSED_BOOK.title: Cursed Book
TH_PATCHOULI-CURSED_BOOK.pages.INITIAL.d:
In an abandoned temple, you find a large open book filled with [jitter][purple]mysterious script[/purple][/jitter].

As you try to decipher the complex text, it [jitter]begins to move and transform into words you recognize[/jitter].
TH_PATCHOULI-CURSED_BOOK.pages.INITIAL.o:
Remove all your cards, then choose one card from each character's card pool and add them to your deck.
Add a [red]Madness[/red] to your deck.
TH_PATCHOULI-CURSED_BOOK.pages.READ.desc:
The contents of the book make you feel [purple]very uneasy[/purple].

Even though you immediately [gold]forget[/gold] the words after reading, [jitter]the book's knowledge permanently changes you[/jitter].
TH_PATCHOULI-CURSED_BOOK.pages.LEAVE.des: You sense a [jitter][purple]dark and ominous[/purple][/jitter] energy emanating from the book on the pedestal, so you decide to leave immediately.
TH_PATCHOULI-GIRL_ROOM.title: Secluded Maiden's Room
TH_PATCHOULI-GIRL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.des:
While making your way toward the top of the tower, you accidentally enter a secret room.

Looking around, you notice that [jitter]the walls and floor seem to have shifted positions before your eyes[/jitter]. The door you entered through has [jitter]vanished[/jitter], and there is no obvious exit.

What do you do?
TH_PATCHOULI-GIRL_ROOM.pages.SEARCH.desc:
Seeing this, you immediately start a thorough search.

After some effort, you find a slightly rusted switch inside a mouse hole in a nearby corner.

Pulling the lever, the surrounding walls begin to [jitter]collapse[/jitter], and you seize the chance to escape.
TH_PATCHOULI-GIRL_ROOM.pages.THINK.descr: You carefully study the arrangement of objects around you, and before long you find the key mechanism and escape.
TH_PATCHOULI-GIRL_ROOM.pages.SLEEP.descr:
The constant climbing has left you tired. Since things have come to this, you decide to sleep a while to recover some energy.

[sine]Zzz ...[/sine]

[sine]Zzz ...[/sine]

When you wake up again, you find yourself outside the secret room, as if everything before was a [jitter]hallucination[/jitter].
